lyrics.jp: 大丈夫、痛みにとっても弱いから
lyrics.romaji: Daijoubu, itami ni tottemo yowai kara
lyrics.en: It's okay, because I'm really bad with pain

lyrics.jp: 大丈夫、憧れは時に憧れのまんま
lyrics.romaji: Daijoubu, akogare wa toki ni akogare no manma
lyrics.en: It's okay, sometimes longing just stays as longing

lyrics.jp: 愛、ジョーク、それとたまにキツめのネガティブ
lyrics.romaji: Ai, jooku, sore to tama ni kitsume no negatibu
lyrics.en: Love, jokes, and sometimes rather harsh negativity

lyrics.jp: それでいつも元通りさ
lyrics.romaji: Sore de itsumo motodoori sa
lyrics.en: And yet we always go back to how we were

lyrics.jp: 君と僕との間柄なら
lyrics.romaji: Kimi to boku to no aidagara nara
lyrics.en: Given the relationship between you and me

lyrics.jp: そりゃ出くわす問題も様々
lyrics.romaji: Sorya dekuwasu mondai mo samazama
lyrics.en: Of course we'll run into all kinds of problems

lyrics.jp: だから隣に居りゃ 旅の道すがら
lyrics.romaji: Dakara tonari ni orya tabi no michisugara
lyrics.en: So if you're by my side, along the road of our journey

lyrics.jp: どんなヤミからも命からがら
lyrics.romaji: Donna yami kara mo inochi karakara
lyrics.en: From any kind of darkness, barely escaping with our lives

lyrics.jp: 助けるよ 助けてよ My Buddy, Darling
lyrics.romaji: Tasukeru yo tasukete yo My Buddy, Darling
lyrics.en: I'll save you, save me, My Buddy, Darling

lyrics.jp: SOSが不器用でも 気にしないからもう
lyrics.romaji: SOS ga bukiyou demo ki ni shinai kara mou
lyrics.en: Even if your SOS is clumsy, I don't mind at all

lyrics.jp: そっけないくらいで僕らは丁度良いんじゃない？
lyrics.romaji: Sokkenai kurai de bokura wa choudo yoi n janai?
lyrics.en: Aren't we just right being a little distant with each other?

lyrics.jp: きっと涙も言葉もおまけでも良いんじゃない？
lyrics.romaji: Kitto namida mo kotoba mo omake demo yoi n janai?
lyrics.en: Surely tears and words can just be extras, right?

lyrics.jp: 多分世界が次のフェーズへ行こうと見つけてみせるよ
lyrics.romaji: Tabun sekai ga tsugi no feezu e ikou to mitsukete miseru yo
lyrics.en: Probably, no matter where the world heads next, I'll find you

lyrics.jp: いや嫌でも見つかるんだろうよ
lyrics.romaji: Iya iya demo mitsukaru n darou yo
lyrics.en: Well, we'd find each other even if we tried not to

lyrics.jp: あっけないくらい早い時間も良いんじゃない？
lyrics.romaji: Akkenai kurai hayai jikan mo yoi n janai?
lyrics.en: Isn't it fine that time passes so fast it feels fleeting?

lyrics.jp: きっとありふれてないくらいが大切なんじゃない？
lyrics.romaji: Kitto arifurete nai kurai ga taisetsu na n janai?
lyrics.en: Surely the fact that it's not ordinary is what makes it precious, right?

lyrics.jp: なんてさ 本気で思っちゃう心の恥ずかしさが僕らだけにあるTATTOO
lyrics.romaji: Nante sa honki de omocchau kokoro no hazukashisa ga bokura dake ni aru TATTOO
lyrics.en: The embarrassment of genuinely feeling this — a TATTOO that belongs only to us

lyrics.jp: 消えない 消さない 消させやしない
lyrics.romaji: Kienai kesanai kesase ya shinai
lyrics.en: It won't disappear, we won't erase it, we won't let it be erased

lyrics.jp: 大丈夫、見せびらかす必要はないから
lyrics.romaji: Daijoubu, misebira kasu hitsuyou wa nai kara
lyrics.en: It's okay, because there's no need to show it off

lyrics.jp: 大丈夫、自分たちだけ分かっていりゃいいから
lyrics.romaji: Daijoubu, jibuntachi dake wakatte irya ii kara
lyrics.en: It's okay, because it's enough that only we understand

lyrics.jp: ハイボール、爆笑の渦に呑まれるネガティブ
lyrics.romaji: Haibooru, bakushou no uzu ni nomareru negatibu
lyrics.en: Highball in hand, negativity swallowed up in a storm of laughter

lyrics.jp: まるで まるで別次元さ
lyrics.romaji: Marude marude betsu jigen sa
lyrics.en: It's like, it's like a completely different dimension

lyrics.jp: そしてそんな君と僕との間柄なら
lyrics.romaji: Soshite sonna kimi to boku to no aidagara nara
lyrics.en: And given the kind of relationship we have

lyrics.jp: そりゃ赤らんだ顔だって晒すわな
lyrics.romaji: Sorya akaranda kao datte sarasu wa na
lyrics.en: Of course we'd show our flushed faces too

lyrics.jp: 今は例えるとか うまく出来ないけどさ
lyrics.romaji: Ima wa tatoeru to ka umaku dekinai kedo sa
lyrics.en: Right now I can't quite put it into words, but

lyrics.jp: かけがえない類いの何かさながら
lyrics.romaji: Kakegae nai tagui no nanika sanagara
lyrics.en: It's like something truly irreplaceable

lyrics.jp: リスペクト 増してくようなDaily Feeling
lyrics.romaji: Risupekuto mashite ku you na Daily Feeling
lyrics.en: A daily feeling where my respect keeps on growing

lyrics.jp: 言い合ったりするのにも もう慣れっこだろう
lyrics.romaji: Iitattari suru no ni mo mou narekko darou
lyrics.en: We're already used to arguing with each other, aren't we

lyrics.jp: 情け容赦無い時代のバッドワードが
lyrics.romaji: Nasake yousha nai jidai no baddo waado ga
lyrics.en: When the harsh words of this merciless era

lyrics.jp: ひょんな時に僕らの事を脅かす時には
lyrics.romaji: Hyon na toki ni bokura no koto o odorokasu toki ni wa
lyrics.en: Unexpectedly try to threaten what we have

lyrics.jp: 絡まる充電のコードのように
lyrics.romaji: Karamaru juuden no koodo no you ni
lyrics.en: Like tangled charging cords

lyrics.jp: どれだけ拗れても もう意地でも繋ぎ合っていようよ
lyrics.romaji: Doredake kojirete mo mou iji demo tsunagi atte iyou yo
lyrics.en: No matter how tangled we get, let's stubbornly stay connected

lyrics.jp: しょうもないくらいの方が笑えていいんじゃない？
lyrics.romaji: Shoumounai kurai no hou ga waraete yoi n janai?
lyrics.en: Isn't it better when it's silly enough to laugh about?

lyrics.jp: きっと思い出して飲んだ時に美味しすぎんじゃない？
lyrics.romaji: Kitto omoidashite nonda toki ni umasu gi n janai?
lyrics.en: Surely when you drink while reminiscing, it'll taste amazing, right?

lyrics.jp: なんてさ 強がりを何度も互いの背中に
lyrics.romaji: Nante sa tsuyogari o nando mo tagai no senaka ni
lyrics.en: Such bravado, stamped on each other's backs over and over

lyrics.jp: 手形みたいにやりすぎなぐらい付け合っていよう
lyrics.romaji: Tegata mitai ni yarisugi na gurai tsuke atte iyou
lyrics.en: Like handprints, let's stamp it on each other way too much

lyrics.jp: そっけないくらいで僕らは丁度良いんじゃない？
lyrics.romaji: Sokkenai kurai de bokura wa choudo yoi n janai?
lyrics.en: Aren't we just right being a little distant with each other?

lyrics.jp: きっと涙も言葉もおまけでも良いんじゃない？
lyrics.romaji: Kitto namida mo kotoba mo omake demo yoi n janai?
lyrics.en: Surely tears and words can just be extras, right?

lyrics.jp: 多分世界が次のフェーズへ行こうと見つけてみせるよ
lyrics.romaji: Tabun sekai ga tsugi no feezu e ikou to mitsukete miseru yo
lyrics.en: Probably, no matter where the world heads next, I'll find you

lyrics.jp: いや嫌でも見つかるんだろうよ
lyrics.romaji: Iya iya demo mitsukaru n darou yo
lyrics.en: Well, we'd find each other even if we tried not to

lyrics.jp: あっけないくらい早い時間も良いんじゃない？
lyrics.romaji: Akkenai kurai hayai jikan mo yoi n janai?
lyrics.en: Isn't it fine that time passes so fast it feels fleeting?

lyrics.jp: きっとありふれてないくらいが大切なんじゃない？
lyrics.romaji: Kitto arifurete nai kurai ga taisetsu na n janai?
lyrics.en: Surely the fact that it's not ordinary is what makes it precious, right?

lyrics.jp: なんてさ本気で思っちゃう心の恥ずかしさが僕らだけにあるTATTOO
lyrics.romaji: Nante sa honki de omocchau kokoro no hazukashisa ga bokura dake ni aru TATTOO
lyrics.en: The embarrassment of genuinely feeling this — a TATTOO that belongs only to us

lyrics.jp: 消えない 消さない 消させやしない
lyrics.romaji: Kienai kesanai kesase ya shinai
lyrics.en: It won't disappear, we won't erase it, we won't let it be erased

lyrics.jp: 大丈夫、 痛みにとっても弱いから
lyrics.romaji: Daijoubu, itami ni tottemo yowai kara
lyrics.en: It's okay, because I'm really bad with pain

lyrics.jp: 大丈夫、 憧れは今日も憧れのまんま
lyrics.romaji: Daijoubu, akogare wa kyou mo akogare no manma
lyrics.en: It's okay, even today longing stays just as longing

vocab.meaning: it's okay, don't worry, no problem
to get complicated, to become tangled
